overall.description: A cinematic third-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The character navigates neon-lit streets, crosses intersections with moderate traffic, and passes street vendors under an elevated highway. The footage is clearly from a video game engine with high-quality rendering of wet surfaces and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street with the MILITECH tower dominating the left skyline. Neon billboards glow on the right while the camera follows a woman in a pink jacket walking ahead. Vehicles speed past on the wet multi-lane road as heavy rain creates reflective puddles on the concrete sidewalk.

black sports car drives through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sidewalk onto a wide intersection crosswalk, with the iconic Arasaka tower rising in the distance. A black sports car cruises through the wet streets as the camera navigates the crossing. The MILITECH building fades from view as the perspective shifts toward the center of the city.

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a bustling street market area with red and white vendor stalls lining the right side of the walkway. Pedestrians browse the stalls while the character navigates through moderate crowd density. Construction barriers line the left side as the elevated transit track looms closer overhead.

segments.scene_description: The character moves under the elevated highway into a semi-covered area sheltered from the rain. The environment becomes grittier with large piles of garbage bags lining the right side. A building with distinctive green neon lighting and an ATM sits on the left, while the concrete overpass structure dominates the overhead space.

events.description: emerging from under the overpass back into open street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk with view of distant neon towers

entered.detail: metal railings along the sidewalk edge
cluster of illuminated skyscrapers with various corporate logos

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens back into the rain with a view of distant neon-lit towers. Orange safety railings line the right side of the walkway as the character continues through the downtown area. The elevated transit track recedes into the background on the left while the camera moves toward the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that transitions from towering corporate skylines into a gritty underpass before emerging back into the neon-lit city center. It begins on a wet sidewalk dominated by the Militech tower and glowing billboards, following a woman in a pink jacket as vehicles speed past through heavy rain. As the camera moves onto a wide intersection crosswalk, the Militech building fades from view and the perspective shifts toward the distant Arasaka tower. The scene then expands into a bustling street market with red and white vendor stalls and construction barriers, before turning under a concrete elevated highway where the environment becomes grittier with piles of garbage and green neon lighting. Finally, the camera emerges from the shelter of the overpass back into the rain, passing orange safety railings as the transit tracks recede and the view opens toward distant neon towers.
